# Interop SDK — Documentation
# Full corpus: https://docs.interop.wonderland.xyz/llms-full.txt

## General
- Interop SDK: https://docs.interop.wonderland.xyz/about — The _Interop SDK_ is a TypeScript library for cross-chain applications. It brings the latest interoperability standar...
- "Installation": https://docs.interop.wonderland.xyz/installation — -   **Node.js** v20.x or higher
- Addresses: https://docs.interop.wonderland.xyz/addresses — Ethereum is multichain. An address like `0xd8dA6BF26964aF9D7eEd9e03E53415D37aA96045` doesn't tell you _which_ chain i...
- Cross-Chain: https://docs.interop.wonderland.xyz/cross-chain — The `cross-chain` package provides a standardized interface for cross-chain token transfers. It lets you fetch quotes...

## Addresses
> Ethereum is multichain. An address like `0xd8dA6BF26964aF9D7eEd9e03E53415D37aA96045` doesn't tell you _which_ chain i...
- Getting Started: https://docs.interop.wonderland.xyz/addresses/getting-started — In this tutorial, you'll parse an interoperable address and extract its components. By the end, you'll know how to go...
- Concepts: https://docs.interop.wonderland.xyz/addresses/concepts — This page explains the standards behind interoperable addresses and how the package implements them.
- Parsing an Interoperable Name: https://docs.interop.wonderland.xyz/addresses/example — In this guide, you'll learn how to extract the raw address and chain ID from an interop address using the Interop SDK...
- Advanced Usage: https://docs.interop.wonderland.xyz/addresses/advanced-usage — This page covers advanced patterns for working with interoperable addresses — validation, checksums, error handling, ...
- API: https://docs.interop.wonderland.xyz/addresses/api — All high-level methods are available as static methods on `InteropAddressProvider` or as standalone exported functions.

## Cross-Chain
> The `cross-chain` package provides a standardized interface for cross-chain token transfers. It lets you fetch quotes...
- Getting Started: https://docs.interop.wonderland.xyz/cross-chain/getting-started — In this tutorial, you'll execute a cross-chain token transfer using the Interop SDK. By the end, you'll know how to c...
- Concepts: https://docs.interop.wonderland.xyz/cross-chain/concepts — This page explains the ideas behind the `cross-chain` package — the architecture, the standards, and the design decis...
- Flow: https://docs.interop.wonderland.xyz/cross-chain/flow — This document provides an overview of the cross-chain transaction flow using the Interop SDK. It illustrates how a de...
- Supported Providers: https://docs.interop.wonderland.xyz/cross-chain/providers — This document lists all cross-chain providers supported by the Interop SDK.
- Across Provider: https://docs.interop.wonderland.xyz/cross-chain/across-provider — The Across Protocol provider enables cross-chain token transfers using the Across bridge infrastructure.
- Relay Provider: https://docs.interop.wonderland.xyz/cross-chain/relay-provider — The Relay Protocol provider enables cross-chain token transfers using the Relay bridge infrastructure.
- OIF Provider: https://docs.interop.wonderland.xyz/cross-chain/oif-provider — The [OIF (Open Intents Framework)](https://github.com/BootNodeDev/intents-framework) provider enables direct integrat...
- Bungee Provider: https://docs.interop.wonderland.xyz/cross-chain/bungee-provider — The Bungee Protocol provider enables cross-chain token transfers using the Bungee bridge infrastructure, supporting b...
- Execute Intent: https://docs.interop.wonderland.xyz/cross-chain/example — This guide demonstrates how to execute a cross-chain intent using the SDK. The process is broken down into clear step...
- Frontend Integration: https://docs.interop.wonderland.xyz/cross-chain/frontend-integration — The [getting-started guide](./getting-started.md) uses `privateKeyToAccount` and a plain Node.js script to keep thing...
- Order Tracking: https://docs.interop.wonderland.xyz/cross-chain/intent-tracking — The SDK includes **order tracking** to monitor cross-chain transfers from initiation to completion.
- Advanced Usage: https://docs.interop.wonderland.xyz/cross-chain/advanced-usage — For complex scenarios, use the Aggregator to manage multiple providers with sorting, timeout handling, and built-in o...
- API: https://docs.interop.wonderland.xyz/cross-chain/api — A set of classes and utilities for handling cross-chain operations through various protocols.
